text.title: Deploy Notes Template with Rollback Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply Deploy Notes Template with Rollback end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: pin-artifact
step.action: Capture git SHA + image digest + package version; reject if any are placeholders.

step.name: map-blast
step.action: List impacted routes, queues, jobs, tables; if none, mark dry_run.

step.name: write-rollback
step.action: Choose rollback path (revert-SHA, image rollback, downgrade pin, migration down). Pin to a one-liner the operator can execute.

step.name: list-verification
step.action: Pick ≥2 surfaces; write the curl/metric/log check and the expected pass criterion.

step.name: review-gate
step.action: Operator reviews; if any field is generic, return to step 1.

step.name: post-deploy-run
step.action: Run verification within rollback window; if any fails, execute rollback_recipe immediately.
